mapper.select: SELECT cr.*, mt.tech_name, mt.tech_price FROM check_request cr LEFT JOIN medical_technology mt ON cr.medical_technology_id = mt.id WHERE cr.register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY cr.creation_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE check_request SET check_result = #{checkResult}, check_employee_id = #{checkEmployeeId}, check_state = 'COMPLETED', check_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, check_remark = #{checkRemark} WHERE id = #{id}
